message:
Sync beads database export after deep review pass

- Updated issues.jsonl reflects the full bead graph state after
  multiple review sessions: alien-artifact enrichment comments on
  13 beads, graveyard bead additions (bd-l7v, bd-22k, bd-1cr,
  bd-6sj, bd-2ps), and FrankenSQLite integration epic (bd-3w1
  with 21 tasks)
- Total: 114 beads (3 epics + 111 tasks), 245 dependency edges,
  0 cycles
- This is a routine br sync --flush-only export; no bead status
  changes, just ensuring the JSONL on disk matches the SQLite db
